title: scrophularia khorassanica
intro: Scrophularia khorassanica, also known as Khorasan figwort, is a plant species within the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) native to Iran and Afghanistan. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Scrophularia khorassanica include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit immunomodulatory effects. Scrophularia khorassanica can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and digestive issues.
